title: Software Developer (React Native)
summary: Delivered full-stack solutions across mobile and web, covering architecture, development, testing, and deployment. Implemented role-based access control and secure authentication flows in SaaS-like POS and mobile applications. Developed and published npm packages to support custom hardware integrations and offline-first functionality.
achievements: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to maintain scalable architecture and optimise performance.

title: Full-Stack Developer
summary: Built a cross-platform ePOS application used by 20+ businesses processing thousands of transactions monthly. Designed and maintained Postgres schemas with query optimisation and migrations. Built and integrated GraphQL APIs with Apollo Server/Client for efficient, type-safe data fetching.
achievements: Developed custom React Native libraries with native C++ via TurboModules and integrated advanced hardware support.

title: Frontend Developer (React)
summary: Developed and maintained scalable web applications using React.js, TypeScript, and modern frontend tooling. Led a small team on select projects, handling task distribution, code reviews, and mentoring. Collaborated with backend and design teams to deliver high-performance, user-friendly interfaces.
achievements: Implemented Redux state management, handled API integrations, and optimised performance across browsers.
